allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://mostruario-marcenaria.vercel.app' -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "Tamanho: $\($r.Content.Length\) bytes"; "Titulo ok: $\($r.Content.Contains\('Marcenaria Bom Madeiro'\)\)"; "Galeria ok: $\($r.Content.Contains\('id=\\"galeria\\"'\)\)"; "Admin ok: $\($r.Content.Contains\('modal-login'\)\)"; "Carrossel ok: $\($r.Content.Contains\('carrossel-trilho'\)\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://mostruario-marcenaria.vercel.app' -UseBasicParsing; $c = $r.Content; 'Status: ' + $r.StatusCode; 'Tem regra corrigida \(display: none na barra\): ' + $c.Contains\('display: none; gap: 12px'\); 'Tem regra body.modo-admin .admin-barra: ' + $c.Contains\('body.modo-admin .admin-barra { display: flex; }'\); 'Tem signOut blindado: ' + $c.Contains\('if \(fb.signOut && fb.auth\)'\))
